title: Toast Duration — add SHORT / NORMAL / LONG auto-dismiss levels to toast notifications
commit_message: feat: add TOAST_DURATION constant and duration field to setToast and toastReducer
changed_symbols: setToast (modified — now accepts toastType and duration params; duration defaults to TOAST_DURATION.NORMAL)
toastReducer (modified — initial state gains duration: 3000; TOAST case stores action.duration)

what_the_diff_does.before: setToast(toast) dispatches only the toast message object. toastReducer stores showToast, toastType, toastQueue. No duration information is tracked — the UI cannot vary dismiss timing.
what_the_diff_does.after: setToast(toast, toastType, duration) now forwards all three values. toastReducer stores duration in state (default 3000 ms). The UI layer can read state.toastReducer.duration to control how long the toast is shown. TOAST_DURATION.SHORT (2 s) suits success confirmations; TOAST_DURATION.LONG (5 s) suits error messages.
what_the_diff_does.visible_change: Success toasts dismiss after 2 s, normal informational toasts after 3 s, and error toasts after 5 s — instead of all toasts sharing the same fixed timing.
what_the_diff_does.compile_note: setToast is backward-compatible: callers that pass only toast continue to work because toastType and duration have defaults (undefined falls back to state.toastType; duration defaults to TOAST_DURATION.NORMAL).

CRITICAL.reason: Two files contribute CRITICAL tests: (1) favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js — describe('toastReducer') matches the changed symbol, 12 tests CRITICAL. (2) toast-duration.pure.test.js — declares toastReducer.js, actions.js, and actiotypes.js as sources and contains describe('TOAST_DURATION') 5 tests, describe('setToast') 5 tests, describe('toastReducer — duration') 5 tests — all 15 are CRITICAL. Total CRITICAL: 27.
tests: toastReducer > initialises with showToast as null
toastReducer > initialises with the default toastType as warning
toastReducer > initialises with an empty toastQueue array
toastReducer > TOAST action stores the toast message object in showToast
toastReducer > TOAST action updates toastType when a new type is provided
toastReducer > TOAST action retains the previous toastType when none is provided
toastReducer > TOAST action stores a queue when a queue is provided
toastReducer > CLEARTOAST action resets showToast back to null
toastReducer > CLEARTOAST does not change toastType or toastQueue
toastReducer > TOAST action with null toast stores null in showToast
toastReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type
toastReducer > accumulates multiple TOAST dispatches with the latest message

HIGH.reason: Two files qualify as HIGH: (1) action-creators.pure.test.js declares src/reducer/actions.js as a source — actions.js is changed. (2) The 12 non-CRITICAL tests in favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js (the favouritesReducer describe block) share the file whose sources include both toastReducer.js and actiotypes.js — both changed.

SKIP.reason: All remaining test files do not declare actiotypes.js, actions.js, or toastReducer.js as a source.

coverage_gaps.gap: Covered by 5 tests in describe('TOAST_DURATION') in toast-duration.pure.test.js.
Covered by 5 tests in describe('setToast') in toast-duration.pure.test.js.
Covered by 5 tests in describe('toastReducer — duration') in toast-duration.pure.test.js.

jest_run_note: toast-duration.pure.test.js runs 15 CRITICAL tests. favourites-watchlist.feature.test.js runs 12 CRITICAL + 12 HIGH tests. action-creators.pure.test.js adds 40 HIGH tests. All 3 gaps closed.
